quick_skim.title: An Efficient Solver for the Richards Equation for Variably Saturated Flows in Porous Media
quick_skim.abstract: We present a nonlinear multigrid solver for the Richards equation in variably saturated porous media with strongly nonlinear hydraulic conductivity and water-retention relationships. The governing equation is discretized using a second-order conservative finite-difference scheme in space and an implicit backward differentiation formula in time. The core component of the solver is a nonlinear Gauss--Seidel (NGS) smoother based on a triangular splitting of the diffusion operator combined with diagonal stabilization. This construction yields a sequence of locally decoupled scalar nonlinear problems that can be solved efficiently and robustly using only a few Newton iterations. Under suitable monotonicity assumptions, we establish the convergence of the NGS iteration in the $L^\infty$ norm and derive explicit conditions on the stabilization parameters. Numerical experiments for benchmark infiltration, drainage, and root-uptake problems demonstrate that the proposed NGS-based multigrid framework is both computationally efficient and robust.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Numerical solver for variably saturated groundwater flow, applicable to coastal aquifer simulation methods.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 变饱和地下水流数值求解器，可应用于海岸带含水层模拟方法。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 变饱和地下水流数值求解器，可应用于海岸带含水层模拟方法。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 变饱和地下水流数值求解器，可应用于海岸带含水层模拟方法。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper presents an efficient nonlinear multigrid solver for the Richards equation in variably saturated porous media, enabling robust simulation of groundwater flow with strong nonlinearities.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对变饱和多孔介质中Richards方程求解效率低的问题，提出了一种非线性多重网格求解器。该方法采用非线性高斯-赛德尔光滑器，将扩散算子三角分裂与对角稳定化结合，生成局部解耦的标量非线性问题，仅需少量牛顿迭代即可高效求解。结果表明，该求解器对强非线性水力传导和持水关系具有稳健性，为地下水流动模拟提供了高效数值工具，可进一步推广至海岸带含水层变密度流模拟。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对变饱和多孔介质中Richards方程求解效率低的问题，提出了一种非线性多重网格求解器。该方法采用非线性高斯-赛德尔光滑器，将扩散算子三角分裂与对角稳定化结合，生成局部解耦的标量非线性问题，仅需少量牛顿迭代即可高效求解。结果表明，该求解器对强非线性水力传导和持水关系具有稳健性，为地下水流动模拟提供了高效数值工具，可进一步推广至海岸带含水层变密度流模拟。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 海岸带地下水及数值模拟相关研究, especially work that connects or combines: coastal aquifer hydrogeology and water resources; seawater intrusion monitoring and management; porewater flow and chemical exchange across sediment-water interfaces; Numerical simulation methods for groundwater flow and transport; variable-density flow and solute transport simulation; characterization of coastal aquifers using geophysical methods; Recent developments in submarine groundwater discharge research and quantification methods; Assessing saltwater intrusion vulnerability under sea level rise scenarios; Mapping offshore fresh groundwater reserves and their resource potential; What are the best practices for modeling saltwater intrusion with density dependent flow?.
